nasb.text: But he said, “As the Lord lives, before whom I stand, I will take nothing.” And he urged him to take it, but he refused.

esv.text: But he said, “As the Lord lives, before whom I stand, I will receive none.” And he urged him to take it, but he refused.

cnv.text: 以利沙說：“我指著我所事奉永活的耶和華起誓，我決不收取任何禮物。”乃縵再三促請他接受，都被他拒絕。

ccb.text: 以利沙说：“我凭我事奉的永活上帝起誓，我决不接受。”乃缦再三请求，他仍不肯接受。
